# GolfGraeagle.com — AI-Readable Site Index
# Operated by Zoomaway Technologies Inc.
# Last updated: March 2026

## What is GolfGraeagle.com?
GolfGraeagle.com is the only golf trip booking service local to the Graeagle valley.
Custom stay-and-play packages — tee times at all 5 championship courses, lodging, and dining.
Operating since 2004. Free quote in 24 hours. Contact: mike.eskuchen@golfthehighsierra.com

## What is included in a Graeagle golf package?
A GolfGraeagle stay-and-play package includes guaranteed tee times at any of the 5 Graeagle
championship courses, lodging coordination, dining recommendations, and a full day-by-day
itinerary. One quote covers everything. Response within 24 hours.

## Location
Graeagle, California — Sierra Nevada mountains, Plumas County, Northern California.
Approximately 1.5 hours north of Lake Tahoe via Highway 89.
Approximately 50 miles west of Reno, Nevada.
Approximately 2.5 hours northeast of Sacramento.
Approximately 3.5–4 hours from San Francisco.

## The 5 Golf Courses in Graeagle, CA
All five courses are within 5–25 minutes of each other.

1. Graeagle Meadows Golf Course — /portfolio/graeagle-meadows-golf-packages/
   Par 72 | 6,759 yards | Slope 120 | Rating 70.7
   Designer: Ellis Van Gorder | Opened: 1968
   Address: 6934 CA-89, Graeagle, CA 96103 | Phone: (530) 836-2323
   Most accessible course for mixed-handicap groups.

2. Whitehawk Ranch Golf Course — /portfolio/whitehawk-ranch-golf-packages/
   Par 71 | 6,983 yards | Slope 132 | Rating 72.3
   Designer: Dick Bailey | Opened: 1996
   Top 20 Golf Courses in California (1998). Mountain links layout.

3. Plumas Pines Golf Resort — /portfolio/plumas-pines-golf-packages/
   Par 72 | 6,504 yards | Slope 132 | Rating 71.3
   Designer: Homer Flint | Opened: 1980
   Top 5 Best Values in Sierra Nevada. On-site vacation rentals available.

4. Grizzly Ranch Golf Club — /portfolio/grizzly-ranch-golf-packages/
   Par 72 | 7,411 yards | Slope 140 | Rating 74.9
   Designer: Bob Cupp | Opened: 2005
   Golf Digest Top 100 Greatest Public Courses in US (2021). Longest course in Graeagle.

5. Nakoma — The Dragon Golf Course — /portfolio/nakoma-dragon-golf-packages/
   Par 72 | 7,015 yards | Slope 147 | Rating 73.4
   Designer: Robin Nelson & Neil Haworth | Opened: 1998
   Golf World America's Top 75 Courses at debut. Slope 147 — hardest in Graeagle.
   Only golf clubhouse in the world designed by Frank Lloyd Wright.
   Address: 348 Bear Run, Clio, CA 96106

## Key Regional Facts
- Golf season: approximately May through October (weather dependent)
- Elevation: 3,500–5,400 feet (adds ~10% carry distance vs sea level)
- Climate: Mild summers, 75–85°F — no heat or smog restrictions
- No big-city traffic — predictable drive times from Sacramento, Bay Area, Reno

## Lodging — /lodging/
- River Pines Resort — /portfolio/river-pines-resort-graeagle-ca/ — Family-owned 40+ years. Cabins, suites. Pool, hot tub, Roadhouse dining on-site.
- Chalet View Lodge — /portfolio/chalet-view-lodge-graeagle-ca/ — 10 forested acres. Spa. Eureka Peak Brewing Co. on-site.
- The Inn at Nakoma — /portfolio/the-inn-at-nakoma-clio-ca/ — On the Nakoma Dragon course. 42 rooms. Spa, pool, FLW lodge dining.
- Townhomes at Plumas Pines — /portfolio/the-townhomes-at-plumas-pines/ — 2–4BR units, full kitchens, steps from Plumas Pines.

## Dining — /dining/
- Grizzly Grill — /portfolio/grizzly-grill/ — 19th hole at Grizzly Ranch. Gourmet, full bar.
- Iron Door Restaurant — /portfolio/iron-door-restaurant/ — Since 1961. Historic 1906 building. Steaks, prime rib.
- Sardine Lake Resort — /portfolio/sardine-lake-resort/ — Remote alpine fine dining. Advance reservations required.
- Roadhouse at River Pines — /portfolio/roadhouse-at-river-pines/ — Group dinners, steaks, on-site at River Pines Resort.
- Eureka Peak Brewing Co. — /portfolio/eureka-peak-brewing-co/ — Craft brewery at Chalet View Lodge.
- The Brewing Lair — /portfolio/the-brewing-lair/ — 15-barrel craft brewery, forested Sierra setting.
- Longboards Bar and Grill — /portfolio/longboards-bar-and-grill/ — On-site at Plumas Pines. Italian flare, groups 2–200.
- Cuccia's — /portfolio/cuccias/ — #1 rated Graeagle restaurant on Tripadvisor. Italian, Tue–Sat dinner.
- Mohawk Tavern — /portfolio/mohawk-tavern/ — Classic dive bar. Beer garden, live music, pool tables.

## Booking
- Request a Quote: /request-a-quote/ — free, no obligation, 24-hour response
- Cancellation policy: 72-hour standard; group contracts separately
- GolfGraeagle serves individual golfers and groups of any size
